# Node.js Binding — @modern_colorthief/node

Install: `npm install @modern_colorthief/node`

## API

```typescript
import { getPalette, getColor } from '@modern_colorthief/node';

const palette = await getPalette(image, colorCount?, quality?);  // number[][]
const color = await getColor(image, quality?);                   // number[]
```

## Parameters

- `image`: `string | Buffer` — file path or image buffer
- `colorCount`: `number` — colors to extract (default: 10)
- `quality`: `number` — sampling quality 1-10 (default: 10)

## Image Decoding

Uses Sharp (peer dependency). Auto-applied in JS layer.

## Runtime Support

Tested against Node.js, Deno, Bun.
